hadith_entries.text:
160. Narrated Mu'aweya : 'I heard Allah's Messenger
saying: "If Allah wants to do good to a person, He makes
him comprehend the religion (the understanding of the
meanings of the Koran and the Sunna (legal ways) of the
Prophet). I am just a distributor, but the grant is from
Allah Remember! This nation (a group of the true
Muslims) will keep on following Allah's teachings strictly
and they will not be harmed by any one going on a
different path until Allah's order (Day of Judgment) is
established." (Bukhari)
مِنَ
said: “A poor ﷺ Narrated Abu-Huraira : The Prophet .161
person is not the one for whom a date or two or a morsel or two
(of food) is sufficient, but the poor person is he who does
not (beg or) ask the people (for something) or show his
poverty at all. Recite if you wish, (Allah's Statement):
"(Charity is) for the poor, who in Allah's Cause are
restricted (from travel), and cannot move about in the land
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
(for trade or work). The one who knows them not, thinks
that they are rich because of their modesty. You may know
them by their mark, they do not beg of people at all. And
whatever you spend in good, surely Allah knows it well. *"
(2:273)
* *
*
